user_query: On childs first day, add cinnamon toast crunch for breakfast

fields.name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch
fields.short_description: Crunchy cinnamon-sugar cereal served with milk — a sweet, familiar breakfast kids love.
fields.meal_suggestion: Pour a serving of Cinnamon Toast Crunch into a bowl and add cold milk (dairy or fortified plant milk). For extra nutrition, top with sliced banana or a handful of berries and a sprinkle of chopped nuts. Serve with a side of yogurt or a boiled egg for added protein.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides quick energy from refined grains and sugars; pairing with milk adds calcium and protein. Adding fruit and a protein side helps balance the meal with fiber, vitamins, and sustained energy.

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested adding Cinnamon Toast Crunch to the child's Day 1 breakfast. Position -1 appends it after existing breakfast options to offer an additional child-friendly cereal choice.
